about.title: About Us
about.description1: We have been providing highly accurate astrology predictions for over 25 years. Our expertise in Thirukkanitham, Vakkiyam, and K.P systems allows us to guide our clients towards a prosperous life.
about.description2: We specialize in personalized horoscope calculations, marriage matching, numerology, and Hebrew name fixing for babies and businesses.
